title: tengine.telemetry.scheduler_gate v1
description: Per-WT gate event from scheduler_watch_ring (slot 340, host_visible). Gated by the TENGINE_SCHEDULER_WATCH_WT env var — zero overhead when unset. Emitted by SignalTimelineDrainer (Phase 5). Producer: registry handle SCHEDULER_GATE in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/track_group.rs. CloudEvents subject is 'frame_{frame}'.

frame.description: GPU frame index at which the gate event was recorded.

gate_kind.description: Kind of scheduling gate encountered (e.g. dependency wait, resource contention).

blocking_wt_id.description: Work-type id of the WT that caused the gate, when known.

gate_ns.description: Duration of the gate wait, in nanoseconds.

reload_generation.description: Hot-reload generation counter at the time of the gate event.
